title: Chugach Alaska Corporation ranks #6 on Alaska Business Monthly’s Top 49ers
summary: Chugach maintained its 2012 ranking at #6 on the list, bringing in more than $609 million in 2013 gross revenues. Arctic Slope Regional Corporation topped the list for the 20th consecutive year. Eighteen of the top 49ers are Alaska Native Corporations, representing the largest block. The 2014 Top 49...
